2020.subject: Verbal Aptitude
2020.instructions: This paper has 8 sections. Section I: Word Analogies (Q1-6). Section II: Odd One Out (Q7-12). Section III: Word Relationships (Q13-17). Section IV: Anagrams (Q18-23). Section V: Sentence Sequencing (Q24-27). Section VI: Code Breaking (Q28-30). Section VII: Missing Letters (Q31-36). Section VIII: Comprehension (Q37-40).

questions.exp: The twins are Abie and Alie. Abdul is 12. Abu is one year older than Abdul = ...

questions.q: The twins are ..........
questions.exp: The passage states Amie is "in the same class with her older twin cousins Abi...

questions.q: .......... is the cleverest child in the family?
questions.exp: The passage says Abdul is "very clever, but not as clever as eight-year-old A...

questions.q: How old is Abu?
questions.exp: Abdul is 12. Abu is one year older than Abdul = 13 years old. Answer D.
